scenes.narration: Samson was the strongest man who ever lived. Nobody could beat him. Not even close.
scenes.image_prompt: Mighty Samson with long flowing hair flexing strong arms, standing tall and heroic, bright colorful bible storybook illustration, cheerful and bold style

scenes.narration: His strength came from one promise — never cut his hair.
scenes.image_prompt: Young Samson with long braided hair pointing to his hair, glowing golden light around him, colorful bible storybook illustration, warm inviting style

scenes.narration: One day Samson was walking through a field. A huge roaring lion jumped out at him.
scenes.image_prompt: Enormous roaring lion leaping from tall grass at Samson in a sunny field, Samson looking surprised but ready, colorful dramatic bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: Samson didn't run. He didn't scream. He grabbed the lion with his bare hands.
scenes.image_prompt: Brave Samson calmly grabbing a huge roaring lion mid-leap with both hands, strong confident expression, dramatic colorful bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: God's strength filled him. And Samson defeated the lion right there in the field.
scenes.image_prompt: Samson standing victoriously over a defeated lion with golden light shining down from the sky, bright colorful bible storybook illustration, triumphant mood

scenes.narration: Later, Samson walked by the same spot. Bees had built a hive inside the lion.
scenes.image_prompt: Samson looking curiously at a large honeycomb inside the remains of the lion, golden bees buzzing around, colorful bible storybook illustration, warm sunny day

scenes.narration: He scooped out the honey and ate it. Sweet as anything he'd ever tasted.
scenes.image_prompt: Samson happily eating golden honey from his hands, honeycomb dripping, smiling face, bright colorful bible storybook illustration, warm cheerful style

scenes.narration: Out of the strong came something sweet. That's how God works sometimes.
scenes.image_prompt: Samson walking away through the field at sunset with honeycomb in hand, golden warm light everywhere, peaceful triumphant mood, colorful bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: The hardest things in life can turn into the sweetest. If you trust who made you strong.
scenes.image_prompt: Samson silhouetted against a brilliant sunset with hands raised toward heaven, peaceful golden glow, bright colorful inspirational bible storybook illustration
